diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -29,6 +29,11 @@
     def forward(self, observations) -> torch.Tensor:

         image = observations["image"].long()

         

+        # SB3 might transpose the image to (B, C, H, W) if it thinks it's an RGB image.

+        # If so, transpose it back to (B, H, W, C)

+        if image.shape[1] == 3 and image.shape[3] != 3:

+            image = image.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)

+            

         obj = self.obj_emb(image[..., 0])

         col = self.col_emb(image[..., 1])

         state = self.state_emb(image[..., 2])

--- a/wrapper.py
+++ b/wrapper.py
@@ -10,13 +10,13 @@
                 low=0,

                 high=255,

                 shape=(7, 7, 3),

-                dtype=np.uint8

+                dtype=np.int32

             ),

             "direction": spaces.Discrete(4)

         })

 

     def observation(self, obs):

         return {

-            "image": obs["image"],

+            "image": obs["image"].astype(np.int32),

             "direction": obs["direction"]

         }
